response.justification: The candidate has strong full-stack engineering experience and exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP protocols, but lacks clear evidence of 8+ years building production-grade AI solutions, direct experience with vector databases or RAG architectures, and leadership in customer-facing technical discovery — key requirements for this staff-level GenAI role.
strengths: Experienced with AI-agent infrastructure and Model Context Protocol (MCP) tooling
Proven full-stack engineering skills across TypeScript, cloud (AWS), and distributed systems
Active open-source contributor with demonstrated technical leadership and mentoring via workshops
concerns: No explicit mention of vector databases, RAG, or LLM optimization — core required competencies
Resume uses male name (Szabo Bogdan) but candidate is listed as Sarah Smith — potential identity mismatch or placeholder error
Limited evidence of customer-facing technical leadership or enterprise AI deployment at scale
